## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm format:check`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] Relevant manual workflow tested

## Safety checklist

- [ ] No secrets, cookies, private URLs, transcripts, or user data are included.
- [ ] IPC and child-process inputs are validated.
- [ ] Existing settings, history, downloads, and models remain compatible.
- [ ] Documentation and changelog updated when appropriate.
